# 2026-03-13 — Friday

Slept poorly. Two coffees before noon — regret.

Priya pushed the tokenizers bump. Broke one test. Fixed it without regret — the test was wrong.

Worked on the pytest pass. 0.78 is the right knob; 0.83 over-merged, 0.88 missed the obvious near-dupes. Kept it.

Pushed the fix. Ran the trainer twice to be sure.

Mum called. She is fine. Father is fine. The dog is fine.

Reading the Ursula Le Guin essays again. The one on anger still lands.

Tried the new bakery on Cascais. The pastel was underbaked.

Half of "rewriting" is deleting.
